purpose: Rerun Phase 13 SI robustness sweep under manifest+rails, using corrected Phase 10 controlled rerun reference numbers. Replaces untrusted May-2 phase13_si_sweep.json.

experiments.name: Phase 13 SI robustness sweep (c in {0.01, 0.1, 0.5})
experiments.notes: ResNet-18, Split-CIFAR-10 task_incremental, 40 epochs/task, 3 seeds, 3 c values. Reference numbers from phase10_controlled_rerun_20260509T132155Z.json.
